codes.name: NON_SUPPORTED_FONT_ERROR
codes.description: Font is not supported by fontist

codes.name: MISSING_FONT_ERROR
codes.description: Font could not be found on the system or in formulas

codes.name: LICENSING_ERROR
codes.description: License agreement required but not accepted

codes.name: MANIFEST_COULD_NOT_BE_FOUND_ERROR
codes.description: Manifest file not found at specified path

codes.name: MANIFEST_COULD_NOT_BE_READ_ERROR
codes.description: Manifest file could not be read (invalid YAML or permissions)

codes.name: FONT_INDEX_CORRUPTED
codes.description: Font index file is corrupted and needs to be rebuilt

codes.name: REPO_COULD_NOT_BE_UPDATED
codes.description: Repository could not be updated (network or git error)

codes.name: MANUAL_FONT_ERROR
codes.description: Manual font installation required (font cannot be downloaded)

codes.name: SIZE_LIMIT_ERROR
codes.description: Formula exceeds size limit. Use --size-limit, --newest, or --smallest options

codes.name: FORMULA_NOT_FOUND
codes.description: Formula not found for the requested font

codes.name: FONTCONFIG_NOT_FOUND
codes.description: Fontconfig is not installed or not found
